html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating Lunar Rift and defeating Celestial Scion

“They came from an enlightened crown - so return them to one, to bask in eternal enlightenment.”

-

The Celestial Jewel is an item dropped by the Celestial Scion. They can be put into Enlightened Crown, changing its appearance when at least 4 slots contain a Celestial Jewel.

An Enlightened Crown containing five Celestial Jewels will lock the wearer's Sanity to full Enlightenment, regardless of the wearer's current sanity. Any changes to the wearer's Sanity will still occur and will be reflected once the Enlightened Crown is removed, similar to the effects of a Bone Helm. Wearing an Enlightened Crown with five Celestial Jewels will also apply the Lunacy filter to the player, as if they were constantly at full Enlightenment on Lunar Island.

When there are at least a few Infused Moon Shards on the ground near a player wearing an Enlightened Crown socketed with five Celestial Jewels, Inimical Gestalts will spawn near the player, replacing the nearby Infused Moon Shards. They will remain neutral to a player wearing an Enlightened Crown unless attacked.

When a player attacks while wearing an Enlightened Crown containing Celestial Jewels, it will always summon a Minor Gestalt to attack the target, as their Sanity is always treated as being above 85%. Each Minor Gestalt summoned this way will still reduce the wearer's actual Sanity by 1.

The damage of the Minor Gestalts varies depending on the number of Celestial Jewels. With four Celestial Jewels, the damage of the Minor Gestalt raises to 46.75 damage, or 51 damage with five Celestial Jewels inserted.

In addition, when there is more than 1 Celestial Jewel in the Crown, part of the damage will convert to Planar Damage. When there are more than 3 Celestial Jewels, 25% of damage convert to Planar Damage.

Minor Gestalt Damage
Damage Number of Celestial Jewels
0 1 2 3 4 5
Planar 0 3.54 7.08 10.63 11.69 12.75
Physical 42.5 38.96 35.42 31.88 35.06 38.25
Total 42.5 42.5 42.5 42.5 46.75 51
Total (vs Planar Entity Protection) 29.19 30.85 32.45 33.97 36.86 39.67

Tips

  • If the player doesn't want the Lunacy filter or the Inimical Gestalts to sometimes spawn around them, they can use only four Celestial Jewels, instead of all five, which still increases the Minor Gestalt's damage significantly.
  • While using all five Celestial Jewels, several synergies take place from having one's Sanity locked at 100%:
    • Night Armor becomes significantly more useful without its massive Sanity drain because of its 95% Physical Damage Reduction, which is really useful for pre-rift boss fights. This is especially true because Nightmare Fuel is relatively easy to come by in the late game by farming Ickers, and Papyrus can be farmed easily using Monkeytails.
      • While Dark Swords are similarly useful by the same logic, they are often replaced by similar, cheaper items such as the Brightshade Sword.
    • The Brightshade Staff always spawns a Minor Gestalt, resulting in a theoretical 5 * (10 + 51) = 305 damage per cast, or 5 * (10 + 39.67) = 248.35 against mobs with Planar Entity Protection.
    • Eating raw or spoiled meat, including Monster Meat, and using items such as a Lazy Explorer or Star Caller's Staff do not reduce sanity.
    • Bosses with huge insanity auras such as Deerclops or Ancient Fuelweaver become significantly easier.
    • The gems that Ancient Statues hold in the Ruins can easily be distinguished by color, as ordinarily one would not know what color its gem is before mining due to the insanity filter.

Trivia

  • Celestial Jewels were added in the Hostile Takeover update.
  • The appearance of Enlightened Crown with Celestial Jewels is similar to W.A.R.B.O.T. and Celestial Scion.
  • Prior to an update[Clarification Needed], Inimical Gestalts would continuously spawn near a player wearing an Enlightened Crown socketed with five Celestial Jewels.

Gallery

  • Celestial Jewel icon from Beta
  • Celestial Jewel from Beta
  • Celestial Jewel Concept Art from Hostile Takeover update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Celestial Jewel Concept Animation from Hostile Takeover update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Celestial Jewel Concept Animation from Hostile Takeover update stream from Rhymes with Play.

Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating Lunar Rift and defeating Celestial Scion
“This formed part of its crown.”
–Wilson
“It's kinda nice to stare into.”
–Willow
“Another trophy for Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“All that remains is its crown.”
–Wendy
“THEY DON'T UNDERSTAND YOU LIKE I DO”
–WX-78
“A piece of its crown, no doubt.”
–Wickerbottom
“We sure topped'em, eh Luce?”
–Woodie
“I told you it was no match for my abilities.”
–Maxwell
“Sprung fröm the shining cörönal öf a mighty deity.”
–Wigfrid
“So pretty! Can we keep it?”
–Webber
“This is its essence.”
–Warly
“Love Baby Night Ball! Love!”
–Wormwood
“We busted'em down to the baubles.”
–Winona
“You went down, and left your crown!”
–Wortox
“Glorp, me keep!”
–Wurt
“I wonder if there's a badge for defeating a moon god?”
–Walter
“I forget if this is the end or the beginning.”
–Wanda
“They came from an enlightened crown - so return them to one, to bask in eternal enlightenment.”
-
The Celestial Jewel is an item dropped by the Celestial Scion. They can be put into Enlightened Crown, changing its appearance when at least 4 slots contain a Celestial Jewel.
An Enlightened Crown containing five Celestial Jewels will lock the wearer's Sanity to full Enlightenment, regardless of the wearer's current sanity. Any changes to the wearer's Sanity will still occur and will be reflected once the Enlightened Crown is removed, similar to the effects of a Bone Helm. Wearing an Enlightened Crown with five Celestial Jewels will also apply the Lunacy filter to the player, as if they were constantly at full Enlightenment on Lunar Island.
When there are at least a few Infused Moon Shards on the ground near a player wearing an Enlightened Crown socketed with five Celestial Jewels, Inimical Gestalts will spawn near the player, replacing the nearby Infused Moon Shards. They will remain neutral to a player wearing an Enlightened Crown unless attacked.
When a player attacks while wearing an Enlightened Crown containing Celestial Jewels, it will always summon a Minor Gestalt to attack the target, as their Sanity is always treated as being above 85%. Each Minor Gestalt summoned this way will still reduce the wearer's actual Sanity by 1.
The damage of the Minor Gestalts varies depending on the number of Celestial Jewels. With four Celestial Jewels, the damage of the Minor Gestalt raises to 46.75 damage, or 51 damage with five Celestial Jewels inserted.
In addition, when there is more than 1 Celestial Jewel in the Crown, part of the damage will convert to Planar Damage. When there are more than 3 Celestial Jewels, 25% of damage convert to Planar Damage.

Tips[edit | edit source]
If the player doesn't want the Lunacy filter or the Inimical Gestalts to sometimes spawn around them, they can use only four Celestial Jewels, instead of all five, which still increases the Minor Gestalt's damage significantly.
While using all five Celestial Jewels, several synergies take place from having one's Sanity locked at 100%:
Night Armor becomes significantly more useful without its massive Sanity drain because of its 95% Physical Damage Reduction, which is really useful for pre-rift boss fights. This is especially true because Nightmare Fuel is relatively easy to come by in the late game by farming Ickers, and Papyrus can be farmed easily using Monkeytails.
While Dark Swords are similarly useful by the same logic, they are often replaced by similar, cheaper items such as the Brightshade Sword.
The Brightshade Staff always spawns a Minor Gestalt, resulting in a theoretical 5 * (10 + 51) = 305 damage per cast, or 5 * (10 + 39.67) = 248.35 against mobs with Planar Entity Protection.
Eating raw or spoiled meat, including Monster Meat, and using items such as a Lazy Explorer or Star Caller's Staff do not reduce sanity.
Bosses with huge insanity auras such as Deerclops or Ancient Fuelweaver become significantly easier.
The gems that Ancient Statues hold in the Ruins can easily be distinguished by color, as ordinarily one would not know what color its gem is before mining due to the insanity filter.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Celestial Jewels were added in the Hostile Takeover update.
The appearance of Enlightened Crown with Celestial Jewels is similar to W.A.R.B.O.T. and Celestial Scion.
Prior to an update[Clarification Needed], Inimical Gestalts would continuously spawn near a player wearing an Enlightened Crown socketed with five Celestial Jewels.
